prompt: Seamless dark ink-green cave-paper background texture for LYDT website: very subtle handmade paper noise, mossy mineral speckles, low contrast, no obvious pattern, no vignette, no objects, no text.
style: tileable web texture, understated premium UI background
composition: square seamless texture, uniform density to all edges
lighting: flat low-contrast surface texture, no directional lighting
palette: near-black ink green, dark teal, tiny desaturated moss flecks
materials: rough handmade paper mixed with mineral cave dust

negative: strong pattern, visible seams, bright speckles, gradients, symbols, illustrations
